title: Bitter Crisp Moroccan Dates Salad
description: This nostalgic dish features a blend of bitter dates, crispy naan bread, and tangy dressing in a dairy-free version for those with dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: 2 naan bread slices
ingredients.notes: preferably whole wheat for added fiber and texture

instructions: Arrange naan bread slices on a baking sheet.
Halve dates and remove pits. Arrange them in an alternating pattern over the naan bread, pressing gently into place.
In a mixing bowl, combine lemon juice, olive oil, minced garlic, honey or agave nectar, and salt. Mix until well combined.
Drizzle dressing evenly over date-naan slices. Place in oven to broil for 5 minutes on high heat (broiler setting).
Remove from oven, let sit for a minute before serving.
